reviews.comment:
Despues de varias malas experiencias lo voy a calificar y poner las fotos correspondientes, pensé que era un mal día pero las ultimas 6 veces que fui mas de 20 min. espernado para que pasen solamente 3 autos, los chicos que trabajan se la pasan hablando y es una falta de respeto al cliente, realmente no se si es por orden de la empresa o que no tienen un control, pero es vergonzoso que no respeten los tiempos de cualquier persona que es lo que correponde.

(Translated by Google)
After several bad experiences, I'm going to rate it and post the corresponding photos. I thought it was just a bad day, but the last six times I went, I waited more than 20 minutes for only three cars to go through. The guys who work there spend their time talking, and it's disrespectful to the customer. I really don't know if it's on company orders or if they don't have any supervision, but it's shameful that they don't respect other people's time, which is what's expected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqc2ZubElREAE

reviews.comment:
Imposible que te atiendan el teléfono , o esta roto que sucede siempre o no te atienden

(Translated by Google)
